TestCase z27Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element to rotate
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Rotate a random sub‑array right by 1
    int l = rand() % follow_case.n;
    int r = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (r < l) {
        int temp = l;
        l = r;
        r = temp;
    }
    
    // Perform the rotation
    int temp = follow_case.a[r];
    for (int i = r; i > l; --i) {
        follow_case.a[i] = follow_case.a[i - 1];
    }
    follow_case.a[l] = temp;
    
    return follow_case;
}
